strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title and scope are senior IC level, not director/principal-level engineering leadership
Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth — no published AI products, platforms, or advanced AI degree
No evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product strategy at scale

key_factors.factor: Years of engineering experience and breadth

response.justification: The candidate brings broad, long-tenured full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience with entrepreneurial open-source work and recent AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure, but the profile reads as a senior individual contributor rather than a principal/director-level technical leader. There is limited evidence of recognized AI expertise, large-scale cloud product strategy, or advising strategic customers, which are central to this role.
